title: The Most Famous Chorus Pedals Ever
description:
What's not to love about chorus? In this episode share (IMHO) the most legendary Chorus pedals ever. Lemme know down in those comments if you own any of these or if you think you have a good submission for this list. 

https://www.thejhsshow.com/
https://www.patreon.com/thejhsshow
https://www.jhspedals.info/

Check out the gear in this and past episodes here:
https://reverb.com/c/jhs-pedal-picks?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott

Gear in this video:
2:05 Boss CE-1 Chorus Ensemble
https://reverb.com/p/boss-ce-1-chorus-ensemble?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
3:21 TC Electronic Stereo Chorus + 
https://reverb.com/p/tc-electronic-stereo-chorus-plus-pitch-modulator-and-flanger?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
4:45 Boss CE-2
https://reverb.com/p/boss-ce-2-chorus?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
6:30 Electro- Harmonix Small Clone 
https://reverb.com/p/electro-harmonix-small-clone-full-chorus-pedal?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
7:50 Ibanez CS9 Stereo Chorus
https://reverb.com/p/ibanez-cs9-stereo-chorus?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
8:33 Ibanez CSL Stereo Chorus
https://reverb.com/p/ibanez-csl-stereo-chorus?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
8:33 Ibanez SC10 Super Stereo Chorus
https://reverb.com/p/ibanez-sc10-super-stereo-chorus?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
9:20 Guyatone Chorus Machine
10:45 Arion SCH-1 Stereo Chorus
https://reverb.com/p/arion-sch-1-stereo-chorus?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
11:12 JHS Emperor V2
https://reverb.com/p/jhs-emperor-v2?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
12:46 Boss DC-2 Dimension C
https://reverb.com/p/boss-dc-2-dimension-c?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
14:09 DOD Stereo Chorus FX65
https://reverb.com/p/dod-stereo-chorus-fx65?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
15:02 DOD Stereo Chorus FX60
https://reverb.com/p/dod-stereo-chorus-fx60?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
16:08 Ibanez DCL Digital Stereo Chorus
https://reverb.com/p/ibanez-dcl-digital-stereo-chorus?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
16:29 Ibanez DSC10 Digital Chorus
https://reverb.com/p/ibanez-dsc10-digital-chorus?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
17:24 Ibanez Twin Cam Chorus TC10
https://reverb.com/p/ibanez-twin-cam-chorus-tc10?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
17:32 Ibanez BCL Bi-Mode Chorus
https://reverb.com/p/ibanez-bcl-bi-mode-chorus?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott
18:58 Digitech Whammy WH-1
https://reverb.com/p/digitech-whammy-wh-1?_aid=growsumo&gs_partner=JoshuaScott

Record Time:
The Japanese House 
- Clean: https://amzn.to/2DBFJhI
- Pools to Bathe in: https://amzn.to/3ftHU43 
- Swim Against the Tide: https://amzn.to/3kh4mRx 

Josh’s record player is by U-Turn Audio:
https://amzn.to/34CRXjr

#jhs #thejhsshow #choruspedals
